header.title: Engage — reply triage
header.description: Reply Sorter reads the connected Gmail mailbox and triages replies into Interested, Unsure, or Not interested. Copy a suggested reply, or open the prospect for the full thread.

account.stats: {drafts, plural, =0 {No drafts awaiting} =1 {# draft awaiting} other {# drafts awaiting}} · {interested} interested
account.connectHint: Connect a Gmail account under Configuration to triage replies here.

drafts.title: Reply drafts
drafts.description: RAG-suggested replies awaiting a human. Copy the draft into your reply, or open the prospect for the full thread.
drafts.emptyDescription: When the reply classifier drafts a suggested response, it appears here for approval.
drafts.nowTitle: The prospect's current verdict has since changed
drafts.copyError: Could not copy — your browser blocked clipboard access.

draftReview.heading: RAG draft review
draftReview.notConnected: Draft Review isn’t connected yet — set N8N_API_URL on the API so it can read the RAG Agent workflow.
draftReview.empty: No drafts awaiting review. Hit Sync from leads to scan every campaign’s leads sheet for unsure replies, or wait for the RAG Agent’s hourly run.
draftReview.noDraftId: This draft has no Gmail draft id — it can’t be sent from here.
draftReview.contextHeading: Context — why this needs a reply
draftReview.notSendableWarning: ⚠ This draft predates draft-id capture, so it can’t be sent from the ERP. Newer drafts carry a Gmail draft id and are sendable.
draftReview.sendHint: n8n sends the final text on approve · then deletes the draft
